steps.title: Submit Your Inquiry
steps.description: Tell us about your event, date, theme, and the dessert ideas.

steps.title: Discuss Details
steps.description: We'll reach out to discuss your vision, answer questions, and gather any inspiration photos or event details.

steps.title: Plan Your Order
steps.description: Together we'll finalize flavors, design, sizing, quantities, pickup details, and pricing.

steps.title: Celebrate
steps.description: Pick up your custom desserts and enjoy a centerpiece designed specifically for your event.
